description: Style Note adidas helps you avoid discomfort by keeping you dry and comfortable. This tee offers you a stylised look that will make sure you look great on your day off. Pair it with a pair of jeans and sports shoes on the weekend or for Friday casuals at your office. Product Details Dark blue polo T-shirt, has a ribbed cutaway collar, chest buttoned placket, short sleeves with Adidas patented three stripes on the arm, branding on the left chest, stitched detailing on the sides and branding above the hemline on the left Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
